calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Failure To Prosecute
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Dismissal For Failure To Prosecute.

Defendant's unopposed "motion for dismissal for failure to prosecute" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
